author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Add conformance tests for YOLO (#869) in conformance_vision_models.rs.

Tests to add:
1. yolo_detection_head_output_shape — [B, num_anchors*(5+num_classes), 13, 13] for 416x416 input. Verify with VOC (20 cls, 3 anch), COCO (80 cls, 3 anch), custom (10 cls, 5 anch).
2. yolo_anchor_box_prediction_structure — output channels = num_anchors*(5+num_classes) encodes objectness+classes+xywh. Verify formula at construction and on forward output dims.
3. yolo_forward_backward_gradient_finite — tiny input (32x32 -> 1x1 grid), backward + no NaN/Inf.
4. yolo_snapshot — deterministic forward output comparison for fixed seed.

No torchvision reference. Tests encode YOLO paper invariants.
